title: Keep Your Bag Stable With the Wzrd Bikes Bar Bag Supports
content:
Wzrd Bikes offers up one of the most minimal handlebar bag supports we’ve seen. The Wzrd Bar Bag Supports are designed to take up a minimal amount of space under your stem. This small but strong bag support will help keep your cables unsquashed, and your paint looking mint. No more head tube rub! This bag support is for smaller bags – burrito bags and similar compact bags. Don’t drop a honker roll top bag on these lil cuties.

A horizontal zip tie through your bag’s webbing allows for quick and easy installation and removal. No need to clip the zip tie if swapping between bikes!

The Bar Bag Supports come in two lengths:

  • Short – 40-80mm stems
  • Long – 90-130mm stems

100% made in Canada, in stock, and shipping to the USA at Wzrd Bikes.

The post Keep Your Bag Stable With the Wzrd Bikes Bar Bag Supports appeared first on The Radavist.
author: John Watson
